title: Caladium haematostigma
taxonomy: Caladium haematostigma is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum, which is a part of the larger group of monocots known as the Angiosperms. Caladium haematostigma is further classified into the order Alismatales, which is a group of flowering plants that are often aquatic or semi-aquatic. This species is also a member of the genus Caladium, a group of plants that are known for their colorful leaves and are often used as ornamental plants. Within the genus Caladium, Caladium haematostigma is a species that is native to tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Caladium haematostigma is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Magnoliophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Alismatales, Family: Arum, Genus: Caladium, Species: C. haematostigma.
